content:
## Code Review — SCRUM-7
### Verdict: APPROVED
### Issues Found
- [severity: warning] [style] `item-list.tsx` uses `item.name` as the React `key` prop (line 21) — if two items share a name, React will produce duplicate key warnings. Consider using an `id` field or the array index as a fallback. Low risk given the current hardcoded dataset of 10 unique names.
- [severity: warning] [security] `ticket.json` contains a Jira `auth_token` in the `callback` object. This file is not committed (harness files are excluded), but verify `.harness/` is in `.gitignore` to prevent accidental exposure.
- [severity: warning] [style] The `CLAUDE.md` diff appends the full Agentic Harness Pipeline Instructions (~400 lines) to the project CLAUDE.md. This is injected by the harness and marked "do not edit manually," but it inflates the committed file significantly. Confirm this is intentional.

### Summary
The implementation cleanly satisfies all nine acceptance criteria: magnifying glass icon, placeholder text, conditional clear button, real-time case-insensitive partial filtering, "No items found" with emoji, bold name / gray category formatting, and full list display when search is empty. The code follows project conventions (functional arrow components, kebab-case files, proper import ordering, TypeScript interfaces, Tailwind styling). The component architecture is well-decomposed into `SearchBar`, `ItemList`, and a data module, with state managed in `page.tsx`. The `.trim()` on search input correctly handles the whitespace-only edge case. Test coverage is thorough: 16 feature tests across three files cover all AC plus edge cases (special characters, spaces-only input, clear-button reset). All 23 tests pass. No security issues, no hardcoded secrets in source, no logic bugs identified.

## QA Matrix — SCRUM-7
### Overall: PASS

### Acceptance Criteria
| # | Criterion | Status | Evidence |
|---|-----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | Search bar displays magnifying glass icon on the left side of the input field | PASS | Unit test `renders with magnifying glass icon and placeholder text` confirms SVG with `aria-hidden="true"` renders. E2E snapshot shows `img` element (the SVG icon) before the textbox in the accessibility tree. Source code positions icon with `absolute left-3`. |
| 2 | Search bar shows placeholder text 'Search items...' when empty | PASS | Unit test `renders with magnifying glass icon and placeholder text` queries by placeholder `"Search items..."`. E2E accessibility tree shows `textbox "Search items..."`. |
| 3 | Clear button (X) appears on the right side of search bar when text is entered and disappears when field is empty | PASS | Unit tests `hides clear button when input is empty` and `shows clear button when text is entered` verify visibility. E2E: initial snapshot has no button; after typing "app", `button "Clear search"` appears. |
| 4 | Clicking the clear button removes all text from search bar and resets the filtered list | PASS | Integration test `resets list to all 10 items when clear button is clicked` passes. E2E: clicked clear button, snapshot confirmed 10 list items restored and search field empty. |
| 5 | List displays all 10 items when search bar is empty | PASS | Integration test `displays all 10 items when search is empty` passes. E2E initial snapshot shows 10 listitem elements. |
| 6 | Search performs case-insensitive partial matching against item names | PASS | Integration tests `filters items case-insensitively` (typing "laptop" matches "Laptop") and `partial match filtering` (typing "app" matches Apple, Pineapple, Application Guide) both pass. |
| 7 | When no items match the search text, display 'No items found' message with an emoji or illustration | PASS | Integration test `shows 'No items found' with emoji when no matches` confirms message with magnifying glass emoji. E2E: typing "zzzznonexistent" shows paragraph with text "No items found" and magnifying glass emoji. |
| 8 | Item cards display name in bold font and category in gray text below the name | PASS | Unit test `renders each item with bold name and gray category` checks `font-bold` class on name and `text-gray-500` class on category. Source confirms `<span className="font-bold">` and `<span className="block text-gray-500">`. |
| 9 | Search filtering updates in real-time as user types (no submit button required) | PASS | Integration tests use `userEvent.type()` which fires character-by-character and verify filtered results without submit. E2E: typed "app" slowly and list updated to 3 items in real-time. Unit test `fires onChange callback on every keystroke` confirms per-keystroke updates. |

### Edge Cases
| Case | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Search with only spaces treated as empty and show all items | COVERED | Integration test `treats spaces-only search as empty and shows all items` passes. Source uses `search.trim()` before filtering. |
| Special characters don't break UI | COVERED | Integration test `does not break with special characters in search` passes with regex-special chars `.*+?^${}()\|[]\\`. Uses `String.includes()` not regex, so no injection risk. |
| Very long search text doesn't break layout | NOT_COVERED | No explicit test, but `String.includes()` handles arbitrary length strings without issue. Input has `w-full` class for layout containment. Low risk. |
| Rapid typing doesn't cause issues | COVERED | `userEvent.type()` simulates rapid sequential keystrokes. No debouncing or async filtering -- state updates synchronously via `useState`, so no race conditions possible. |
| Empty/null item names handled gracefully | NOT_COVERED | No explicit test for null/undefined item names. However, the hardcoded `items-data.ts` array has all valid string names. If a name were `undefined`, `toLowerCase()` would throw. Low risk given static data. |

### E2E Visual Validation
| Page/Component | Screenshot | Status | Notes |
|---------------|-----------|--------|-------|
| Homepage - initial state (all 10 items) | `.harness/screenshots/e2e-initial-state.png` | PASS | All 10 items visible, search bar with magnifying glass icon and placeholder rendered. Note: Tailwind CSS not loaded in dev (no PostCSS processing visible), so SVG icon renders at full size. Functionally correct. |
| Homepage - filtered by "app" | `.harness/screenshots/e2e-filtered-app.png` | PASS | 3 items shown (Apple, Pineapple, Application Guide). Clear button visible. Real-time filtering confirmed. |
| Homepage - no results | `.harness/screenshots/e2e-no-results.png` | PASS | "No items found" message with magnifying glass emoji displayed. Clear button available to reset. |

### Test Results
Unit/Integration: 23 passed, 0 failed
E2E: 3 scenarios passed (initial load, real-time filtering, no-results state, clear b

  "units": [
    {
      "id": "unit-1",
      "description": "Create the SearchBar component with magnifying glass icon, 'Search items...' placeholder, and clear (X) button that appears when text is entered. The component accepts value and onChange props. Includes unit tests for rendering, clear button visibility, and clear button click behavior.",
      "affected_files": [
        "src/components/search-bar.tsx",
        "src/__tests__/search-bar.test.tsx"
      ],
      "dependencies": [],
      "test_criteria": [
        "Renders with magnifying glass icon and 'Search items...' placeholder text",
        "Clear button (X) is hidden when input is empty",
        "Clear button (X) appears when text is entered",
        "Clicking clear button calls onChange with empty string",
        "Input value is controlled via value prop",
        "onChange callback fires on every keystroke"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "unit-2",
      "description": "Create the ItemList component with 10 hardcoded items (name + category), the items data file, and integrate both SearchBar and ItemList into the homepage (page.tsx). Includes filtering logic (case-insensitive partial match on item name), 'No items found' empty state with emoji, and item display formatting (bold name, gray category). Includes integration tests for filtering behavior, empty state, item formatting, and the clear-button-resets-list flow.",
      "affected_files": [
        "src/lib/items-data.ts",
        "src/components/item-list.tsx",
        "src/app/page.tsx",
        "src/__tests__/item-list.test.tsx",
        "src/__tests__/home-page.test.tsx"
      ],
      "dependencies": ["unit-1"],
      "test_criteria": [
        "All 10 items are displayed when search text is empty",
        "Filtering is case-insensitive (e.g., 'APPLE', 'apple', 'Apple' all match)",
        "Filtering is partial match (e.g., 'app' matches items containing 'app')",
        "Shows 'No items found' message with emoji when no items match",
        "Each item displays name in bold and category in gray text",
        "Clearing search resets list to show all 10 items",
        "Search with only spaces shows all items",
        "Special characters in search do not break the UI"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
